title: Create: Additions
description:
Presenting, Create: Additions
"Create: Additions" is a Create Mod centric ModPack, adding multiplayer, quality of life changes, and a new way to experience the world of Minecraft!
body:
# **Overveiw**
  The "Create: Additions" ModPack offers players an exciting expansion to both "The Create Mod" and the whole Minecraft experience!
     This modpack breathes new life within the game, through a hand picked collection of enhancements that will still offer the great **feeling** of playing Minecraft.

# The "Additions" to Create: Additions
With over 200 high-quality mods, over fifty immersive resource packs, and eight stunning shader packs, your world will look and feel more dynamic than ever before. Whether you are engineering contraptions, exploring vast landscapes, playing with your friends, or simply soaking in the beautiful visuals this pack delivers; you will experience a truly elevated Create experience.
## Have Fun!
This **is the** definitive way to play the [Create](https://modrinth.com/project/LNytGWDc) mod, and possibly the best way to experience Minecraft as a whole, so I take it upon **you** to create a new world and have fun!



### MUST DO BEFORE GAME LAUNCH;
Before the launch of the modpack please make sure check *Custom memory allocation*, and set it to anywhere over nine gigabytes (>9,000mb).  If these actions are not done, your game will either crash or not load.


**[FABRIC & FORGE DISCONTINUED]**
